response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified performer Sakura Miko and two songs: 'すてきなホリデイ' and '好き!雪!本気マジック'. 2. Mapped scenes based on song changes. 3. Used search tool to confirm artist/composer and retrieve lyrics for both songs. 4. Compiled full lyrics and structured data into JSON.
response.global_summary: A performance video featuring VTuber Sakura Miko singing two Christmas-themed songs: 'Sutekina Holiday' by Mariya Takeuchi and 'Suki! Yuki! Honki Magic' by Mitchie M.

scenes.description: Sakura Miko performs 'Sutekina Holiday'. She sings and dances in a festive Christmas-themed set. On-screen text indicates the song title.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
華やぎ始めた街は急ぎ足
街は急ぎ足
贈り物決まる頃
たそがれがねてく
かじかんだ指をママが温めるね
Happy holidays, happy holidays
What a glorious time of year!
大切なものはみんなそばにある
穏やかな毎日が続きたく
クリスマスがもうじきやってくる
うれしさをかくせない犬や猫まで
もみの木に灯る明かりをうけて
いつもよりやさしそうなパパの目が笑ってる
クリスマスは誰にもやってくる
もしひとりぼっちでも寂しがらずに
心に住むサンタに呼びかけて
幼い頃の夢を思い出してごらんよ
手ごろうよ
クリスマスが今年もやってくる
クリスマスが今年もやってくる
悲しかった出来事を消し去るように
さあパジャマを脱いだら出かけよう
少しずつ白くなる街路樹を駆け抜けて
Happy happy holidays
Happy happy holidays
Happy happy holidays
Happy happy holidays
Happy happy holidays
Happy happy holidays
Happy happy holidays
Happy happy holidays
Happy happy holidays
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The city starting to get lively is in a hurry
The city is in a hurry
By the time the presents are decided
The twilight is falling asleep
Mama warms my frostbitten fingers
Happy holidays, happy holidays
What a glorious time of year!
The important things are all by my side
I want the peaceful days to continue
Christmas is coming soon
Even dogs and cats can't hide their joy
Receiving the lights that glow on the fir tree
Papa's eyes, looking gentler than usual, are laughing
Christmas comes to everyone
Even if you're all alone, don't be lonely
Call out to the Santa living in your heart
Try remembering the dreams of your childhood
It's easy
Christmas is coming again this year
Christmas is coming again this year
As if to erase the sad things
Come on, take off your pajamas and let's go out
Running through the roadside trees that are gradually turning white
Happy happy holidays
Happy happy holidays
Happy happy holidays
Happy happy holidays
Happy happy holidays
Happy happy holidays
Happy happy holidays
Happy happy holidays
Happy happy holidays

scenes.description: Sakura Miko performs 'Suki! Yuki! Honki Magic'. She continues dancing in the same set, with festive decorations. On-screen text indicates the song title and composer 'Mitchie M'.
